name: Chocolate Butterscotch Scotcheroos
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, cook the corn syrup and sugar over medium heat, stirring frequently until the mixture begins to boil.
2. Remove from heat. Stir in the peanut butter.
3. Mix in the cereal.
4. Press into a buttered 9x13 pan.
5. Melt the chocolate chips and butterscotch chips over hot (not boiling) water, stirring constantly until smooth.
6. Spread over the cereal mixture.
7. Chill until firm, about 15 minutes.
